svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Codex"> <diagram id="spreadconstraints-selection-flow" name="Selection Flow"> <mxGraphModel dx="-611" dy="-345" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="827" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=24;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#172B4D;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" value="Hierarchical SpreadConstraint Selection Flow" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="650" x="260" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="start" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3FCEF;strokeColor=#36B37E;fontColor=#172B4D;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="Start scheduling with feasible clusters" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="290" x="440" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="input" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#DEEBFF;strokeColor=#2684FF;fontColor=#172B4D;fontSize=14;spacing=10;" value="Read Placement.SpreadConstraints" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="290" x="440" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hasConstraints" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF0B3;strokeColor=#FFAB00;fontColor=#172B4D;fontSize=14;spacing=8;" value="SpreadByField constraints declared?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="260" x="455" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="returnAll" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F4F5F7;strokeColor=#6B778C;fontColor=#172B4D;fontSize=14;spacing=10;" value="Use existing direct cluster selection path" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="260" x="80" y="285" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="normalize" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#DEEBFF;strokeColor=#2684FF;fontColor=#172B4D;fontSize=14;spacing=10;" value="Normalize constraints by hierarchy
provider -> region -> zone -> cluster" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="290" x="440" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="invalid" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFEBE6;strokeColor=#FF5630;fontColor=#172B4D;fontSize=14;spacing=8;" value="Invalid constraints?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="260" x="455" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="failValidation" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFEBE6;strokeColor=#FF5630;fontColor=#172B4D;fontSize=14;spacing=10;" value="Fail validation
duplicate field or missing cluster" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="260" x="825" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="buildTree" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EAE6FF;strokeColor=#6554C0;fontColor=#172B4D;fontSize=14;spacing=10;" value="Build topology tree from feasible clusters
root / provider / region / zone / cluster" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="290" x="440" y="610" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nextLevel" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#DEEBFF;strokeColor=#2684FF;fontColor=#172B4D;fontSize=14;spacing=10;" value="Take next declared level" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="290" x="440" y="720" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="clusterLevel" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF0B3;strokeColor=#FFAB00;fontColor=#172B4D;fontSize=14;spacing=8;" value="Is level cluster?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="85" width="260" x="455" y="805" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="selectGroups" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3FCEF;strokeColor=#36B37E;fontColor=#172B4D;fontSize=14;spacing=10;" value="Select groups at this declared level
respect minGroups and maxGroups" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="260" x="80" y="810" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="groupsOk" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF0B3;strokeColor=#FFAB00;fontColor=#172B4D;fontSize=14;spacing=8;" value="Enough groups and downstream capacity?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="260" x="80" y="920" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="failGroups" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFEBE6;strokeColor=#FF5630;fontColor=#172B4D;fontSize=14;spacing=10;" value="Fail scheduling
spread constraints cannot be satisfied" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="260" x="80" y="1050" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="scope" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EAE6FF;strokeColor=#6554C0;fontColor=#172B4D;fontSize=14;spacing=10;" value="Narrow candidate scope to selected groups
skip undeclared intermediate levels" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="290" x="440" y="930" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="finalize" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3FCEF;strokeColor=#36B37E;fontColor=#172B4D;fontSize=14;spacing=10;" value="Finalize clusters from candidate scope
score, resource, overflow, name tie-break" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="270" x="825" y="815" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dedupe" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#DEEBFF;strokeColor=#2684FF;fontColor=#172B4D;fontSize=14;spacing=10;" value="De-duplicate multi-zone clusters
re-check cluster.minGroups" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="270" x="825" y="930" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="clustersOk" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF0B3;strokeColor=#FFAB00;fontColor=#172B4D;fontSize=14;spacing=8;" value="Cluster constraint satisfied?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="85" width="260" x="830" y="1040" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="failClusters" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFEBE6;strokeColor=#FF5630;fontColor=#172B4D;fontSize=14;spacing=10;" value="Fail scheduling
not enough selected clusters or resources" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="270" x="825" y="1170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="success" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3FCEF;strokeColor=#36B37E;fontColor=#172B4D;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="Return selected target clusters" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="280" x="445" y="1180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#6B778C;fontColor=#172B4D;fontSize=13;spacing=10;" value="Declared levels only: if region is not declared, region is not selected and is not part of group identity." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="300" x="795" y="650" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="start" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#6B778C;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="input" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="input" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#6B778C;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="hasConstraints" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="hasConstraints" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#6B778C;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontColor=#172B4D;" target="returnAll" value="No"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="hasConstraints" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#6B778C;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontColor=#172B4D;" target="normalize" value="Yes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="normalize" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#6B778C;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="invalid" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="invalid" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#6B778C;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontColor=#172B4D;" target="failValidation" value="Yes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="invalid" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#6B778C;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontColor=#172B4D;" target="buildTree" value="No"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="buildTree" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#6B778C;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="nextLevel" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" edge="1" parent="1" source="nextLevel" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#6B778C;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="clusterLevel" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e10" edge="1" parent="1" source="clusterLevel" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#6B778C;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontColor=#172B4D;" target="selectGroups" value="No"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e11" edge="1" parent="1" source="selectGroups" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#6B778C;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="groupsOk" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e12" edge="1" parent="1" source="groupsOk" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#6B778C;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontColor=#172B4D;" target="failGroups" value="No"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e13" edge="1" parent="1" source="groupsOk" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#6B778C;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontColor=#172B4D;" target="scope" value="Yes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e14" edge="1" parent="1" source="scope" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#6554C0;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontColor=#172B4D;" target="nextLevel" value="Next declared level"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="585" y="1040" /> <mxPoint x="390" y="1040" /> <mxPoint x="390" y="748" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e15" edge="1" parent="1" source="clusterLevel" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#6B778C;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontColor=#172B4D;" target="finalize" value="Yes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e16" edge="1" parent="1" source="finalize" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#6B778C;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="dedupe" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e17" edge="1" parent="1" source="dedupe" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#6B778C;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="clustersOk" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e18" edge="1" parent="1" source="clustersOk" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#6B778C;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontColor=#172B4D;" target="failClusters" value="No"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e19" edge="1" parent="1" source="clustersOk" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#6B778C;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontColor=#172B4D;" target="success" value="Yes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
